products.name: DEAD FISH SWEAT TEE
products.description: Oversized sweat tee crafted from 100% organic French Terry cotton for everyday comfort. Designed with a relaxed fit, drop shoulders, ribbed trims, and side pockets for effortless daily wear. Finished with a front graphic print inspired by the Red Sea and a message of individuality.

products.name: THE STASH CAN
products.description: A compact storage can designed to keep everyday essentials organized and within reach. Featuring a removable lid and a vintage-inspired finish, it adds a playful industrial touch to desks, shelves, and living spaces. Ideal for storing office supplies, small accessories, plants, or other daily essentials.

products.name: THE MATCHBOX
products.description: A compact matchbox is designed to bring a subtle statement to everyday spaces. Featuring custom JUNKTEE branding and a unique interior pattern, it combines practicality with a distinctive design aesthetic. Ideal for lighting candles, incense, or adding a decorative touch to your home.

products.name: THE TOTE
products.description: A versatile canvas tote designed for everyday use. Featuring twin shoulder straps and logo prints on the front and back, it offers a practical carry-all solution for work, errands, travel, and daily essentials. Finished with a clean, minimalist design that complements any lifestyle.
